pages.raw_text:
w. G. Cole, secretary of the COM
mercial club of Palouse Falls,
Wash, has been in Spokane the
past few days. Mr.. Cole is well
pleased with the enthusiasm dis
played by all the members and pre-
diets that the club will do a great
deal of good in the way Of improve
ment and development at Palouse
Falls and in the Washtucna valley
the coming season.


Charles Kolb and John Bruhn,
local contractors, have been
awarded the contract for building
the extension of the flume in the
Washtucna valley. which is being
developed by the Palouse Irrigation
& Power Co. This new flume will
carry the water for about 5000
acres of land that will be put on
the market in five and 10 acre
tracts this spring. The contract
calls for the completion of the
flume by April I.
